configureEslint.description: Generate runtime ESLint integration from all governance profiles.
configureEslint.x-prompt: Generate ESLint module-boundary integration from governance profiles? (recommended)

eslintConfigPath.description: Explicit path to the flat ESLint config file to patch when configureEslint is enabled. When omitted, Nx Governance autodetects eslint.config.mjs, eslint.config.cjs, then eslint.config.js.

governanceHelperPath.description: Path where the generated governance depConstraints helper module should be written when configureEslint is enabled.

preset.description: Built-in governance starter presets to seed when init creates missing profile files. When profile is omitted, the first selected preset becomes the default runtime profile for generated root targets. backend-layered-3tier and backend-layered-ddd are mutually exclusive.
preset.x-prompt: Select one or more built-in governance starter presets to seed.

profile.description: Governance profile name to wire into generated root targets and to seed when it is missing. When omitted, init uses the first selected preset name. Built-in options include frontend-layered, backend-layered-3tier, and backend-layered-ddd. layered-workspace remains accepted as a compatibility alias.

profilePath.description: Governance profile path to seed or migrate when extracting inline ESLint depConstraints.

targetPreset.description: Controls which root governance targets the init generator writes. Use "minimal" for the default repo-health plus governance-graph surface, or "full" to restore the broader governance, diagnostic, snapshot/drift, and AI target set.
targetPreset.x-prompt: Select the governance root target preset to generate.
